hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$file" == *.java ]]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && mvn compile -q --no-transfer-progress -pl $(echo "$file" | grep -oP 'consigno-[^/]+') 2>&1 | head -30 || true; fi

file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$file" == *Test.java ]]; then module=$(echo "$file" | grep -oP 'consigno-[^/]+'); cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && mvn test -pl "$module" -q --no-transfer-progress 2>&1 | tail -20 || true; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push.*(main|master)'; then echo '{"block": true, "message": "Push direct sur main interdit. Crée une branche feature/ et ouvre une PR."}' >&2; exit 2; fi

file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(p12|pfx|jks|keystore)$'; then echo '{"block": true, "message": "Ne jamais modifier les fichiers de certificats directement. Utiliser CertificateService."}' >&2; exit 2; fi

file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file" | grep -q 'consigno-packaging/'; then branch=$(git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$branch" == 'main' || "$branch" == 'master' ]]; then echo '{"block": true, "message": "Modifications packaging uniquement sur une branche release/."}' >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null && echo '=== ConsignO Desktop ===' && echo "Branche: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" && echo "Derniers commits:" && git log --oneline -3 2>/dev/null && echo "Modules: $(ls -d consigno-* 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ')" && echo '========================'
